Instagram Feed

The Instagram Feed section shows a small photo gallery. Use it for brand photos, customer looks, styling ideas, or social proof.

Add an Instagram Feed

  1. Go to Content -> Homepage Configurator -> Sections.
  2. Click Add New Section.
  3. Enter a Title, for example Aurum Vale Gallery.
  4. Set Section Type to Instagram Feed.
  5. Set Enabled to Yes.
  6. Use a Sort Order so it appears in the right place on the homepage.
  7. Fill the Instagram Feed Configuration fields.
  8. Click Save.

Main settings

SettingWhat it does
Section TitleGallery title. If empty, the section title is used.
Section SubtitleSmall text below the title, such as Follow us @aurumvale.
Instagram HandleYour Instagram username, such as @aurumvale.
Columns DesktopNumber of images in one row on desktop.
Columns MobileNumber of images in one row on mobile.
Masonry LayoutKeeps images in a natural gallery style.
Show Hover IconShows an Instagram icon when shoppers hover over an image.

Image fields

Click Add Image, then fill these fields.

FieldWhat to enter
ImageUpload the gallery image. Maximum file size is 4 MB.
Link URLLink for the image, such as an Instagram post or product page.

Storefront result

Good practice

  • Use clear lifestyle or jewellery-detail photos.
  • Keep the gallery small on the homepage.
  • Link images to useful pages.
  • Check mobile spacing after saving.
